name: huh (Interactive Terminal Forms for Go)

performance.notes: Waits for user input; no computational overhead

agent_readiness.notes: Beautiful interactive form inputs for Go CLIs. Form fields: Input, Text (multiline), Select, MultiSelect, Confirm, Note, FilePicker. huh.NewForm(huh.NewGroup(fields...)).Run(). Accessible mode for screen readers. Themes: Charm, Dracula, Catppuccin, Base16. Validation support. Part of Charmbracelet ecosystem (works with Bubbletea). Used in gh-dash, Soft Serve, and many Charm tools. Standalone (no Bubbletea required) or as Bubbletea model. Successor to older Bubbletea form libraries.

gotchas: Non-interactive environments (CI) will fail without proper checks
Newer library — some edge cases vs battle-tested alternatives
best_when: Go CLI tools needing polished interactive forms
Configuration wizards and setup flows in Go CLIs
Tools using Bubbletea for complex TUI needing form integration
summary: huh provides beautiful interactive form inputs for Go CLIs. Input, Select, MultiSelect, Confirm, FilePicker fields. Charm/Dracula/Catppuccin themes. Validation. Works standalone or as Bubbletea model. Part of Charmbracelet ecosystem. Best for Go CLI tools needing polished user-facing configuration flows and setup wizards. Charmbracelet's answer to Inquirer.js/Clack for Go.
